description: Magical artifacts, enchanted objects, and arcane instruments.
items: Orb
A smooth sphere of crystal that pulses with inner light.
Wand
A slender rod of carved wood that channels magical energy.
Scroll
A rolled parchment inscribed with glowing runes of power.
Crystal
A faceted gem that hums with stored arcane energy.
Potion
A bubbling liquid in a stoppered vial with mysterious effects.
Staff
A tall rod of ancient wood crowned with a glowing focus.
Rune
A carved symbol radiating magical force.
Tome
A heavy book of bound leather containing arcane knowledge.
Totem
A carved figure imbued with spiritual power.
Charm
A small enchanted trinket that wards off harm.
Sigil
A magical symbol etched into metal or stone.
Grimoire
A spellbook of dark and forbidden magic.
Scepter
A jeweled rod of authority crackling with power.
Crystal Ball
A clear sphere that reveals visions of distant places.
